title: Timișoara、Timiș — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Timișoara、Timișの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

TimișoaraはTimișにある人口319,279の都市です。The city where the 1989 Revolution began, known as Little Vienna for its stunning Secessionist architecture, multicultural heritage, and thriving arts scene.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
